chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-5811 of 2025 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Hearing 1. For orders on office objection No.1 2. For hearing of main case 04.03.2026 None present for the petitioner Mrs. Shazia Hanjrah, DAG M/s. Hakim Ali Shaikh and Sageer Ahmed Abbasi, Additional Advocates General, Sindh alongwith PI Adnan Asmat, SHO Defence, Karachi/Respondent No.5 ---------------------- None present for the petitioner, similar was the position on the last date of hearing. Learned Additional Advocate General, Sindh submits that missing persons have been surfaced, as they have reached home safely. Since the missing persons have been surfaced therefore purpose of this petition has been served. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed having become infructuous. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE B-K Soomro
